role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on script (Latin) and language (English) on the 'CLAVERTON ST' sign.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed vegetation (banana trees), terrain, and lighting/shadows.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed the blue street sign, traffic lights, and road markings.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized utility pole styles, fencing, and general infrastructure.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Australia by leveraging specific regulatory (blue street sign) and meta (utility poles) evidence to distinguish it from New Zealand, despite the strong landscape/botanical overlap.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified English text and Latin script.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described banana trees, palms, and flat terrain.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified Musa and background forest types.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described the blue street sign and traffic lights.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly described wooden poles and paling fencing.
